idea-plugin.name: TokenPulse
idea-plugin.description:
TokenPulse aggregates token balances and credit usage across multiple AI providers directly in your IDE status bar. Track your AI spending in real-time.

Beta Release: This is an early release. Features may change and some functionality may be incomplete. Please report issues on GitHub.

Supported Providers:
  • OpenRouter — Provisioning Key with credits tracking
  • Cline — API Key for personal and organization accounts
  • OpenAI Platform — Admin API Key with usage/costs via Organization APIs
  • ChatGPT Subscription — OAuth flow for Pro/Plus subscription tracking
  • Nebius AI Studio — Cookie-based auth with trial/paid balance
  • Claude Code — CLI-based usage extraction
Features:
  • Live credit & token balance in the status bar
  • Dashboard with per-account status, credits, and timestamps
  • Configurable auto-refresh with smart TTL caching
  • Secure credential storage via IntelliJ PasswordSafe
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0 — Initial beta release (2026-03-10)
  • Multi-provider support: OpenRouter, Cline, OpenAI Platform, ChatGPT Subscription, Nebius AI Studio, Claude Code
  • Status bar widget: Live aggregate balance in your IDE
  • Dashboard: Per-account details with status, credits, tokens, and timestamps
  • Settings page: Full CRUD account management under Tools → TokenPulse
  • Smart caching: TTL-based auto-refresh with single-flight coalescing
  • Secure storage: All credentials stored via IntelliJ PasswordSafe
  • Onboarding: Welcome and "What's New" notifications

action.description: Shows a table with all configured token balances
Force a refresh of all configured account balances
Configure AI provider accounts and refresh interval
